name: litellm-connector-copilot
description: An extension that integrates LiteLLM proxy into Copilot

baseUrl.title: Server URL
baseUrl.description: Base URL for the LiteLLM proxy server (must start with http:// or https://).

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: API key used to authenticate with the LiteLLM proxy.

litellm-connector.modelIdOverride.description: (Deprecated) Optional: force a specific LiteLLM model id for legacy workflows.

litellm-connector.commitModelIdOverride.description: Override the model ID for git commit message generation. If empty, the feature is disabled.
litellm-connector.commitModelIdOverride.markdownDescription: Override the model ID for git commit message generation. If empty, the feature is disabled.

litellm-connector.enableResponsesApi.description: Enables support for VSCode Response API <-> LiteLLM Responses

litellm-connector.disableQuotaToolRedact.description: Disable per-turn tool redaction when a quota error is detected in chat history. Leave off to keep redaction enabled.

litellm-connector.modelOverrides.description: User-supplied model overrides for reasoning capabilities. Merged on top of bundled overrides (user entries take precedence on regex match). Each entry: { match: string (regex), supportsReasoning?: boolean|null, reasoningEfforts?: string[], defaultEffort?: string, notes?: string }.

match.description: Regex pattern matched against the model id.

supportsReasoning.description: Override reasoning support. null = inherit from proxy.

litellm-connector.modelCapabilitiesOverr.description: Override model capabilities (toolCalling, imageInput) reported to VS Code. Key is the Model ID (e.g. 'gpt-4o'), value is a comma-separated list of capabilities to ENABLE (e.g. 'toolCalling,imageInput').

litellm-connector.inactivityTimeout.description: Timeout in seconds of inactivity before the LiteLLM proxy connection is considered idle.

litellm-connector.disableCaching.description: When enabled, LiteLLM caching will be bypassed by sending 'no-cache: true' and 'Cache-Control: no-cache' headers.

litellm-connector.enableModelOverrides.markdownDescription: Enable/disable the model override system. When enabled, merged user and bundled model override rules are applied. When disabled, only LiteLLM `/model/info` derived capabilities are used.

litellm-connector.sendDefaultParameters.markdownDescription: When enabled, LiteLLM Connector will send default values for temperature (0.7), frequency_penalty (0.2), and presence_penalty (0.1) if not explicitly provided by VS Code. Recommended: false.
litellm-connector.sendDefaultParameters.deprecationMessage: This setting is temporary and will be removed in a future version. Defaults will be omitted by default.

scripts.vscode:pack:dev: npm run clean:build && tsc --noEmit && node esbuild.js && npx vsce package
scripts.vscode:pack: npm run clean:build && tsc --noEmit && node esbuild.js --production && npx vsce package
scripts.download-api: yes | dts main && mv vscode.d.ts src/ && yes | dts dev && mv vscode.proposed.*.d.ts src/
scripts.test:report: npm run pretest && export VSCODE_TEST_RESULTS_DIR=$PWD/test-results && mkdir -p $VSCODE_TEST_RESULTS_DIR && npm run test
